form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 34-day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 3 len at this track March 5 over 2000m defeating Fireball carrying 57kg at $1.70. Before that gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 14 at this track on February 3 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind Tenderly carrying 56kg at $15.10. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation to post a big 30 len win. Kanazawa December 14 over 1700m defeating Ecoro Blade carrying 55kg at $1.60. Previously first up; second of 9 at Kanazawa August 4 over 1500m, 1.5 len behind Apollo Miracle with 55kg at $1.50. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.
